Account.Name: Committee Operating Checking
Account.Description: Primary hospitality committee account - Harbor Bank of Maryland

Account.Name: Event Reserve Fund
Account.Description: Set aside for large receptions and the annual bake sale

Account.Name: Designated Offerings
Account.Description: Offerings designated to the hospitality ministry

Account.Name: Event Meal Contributions
Account.Description: Suggested per-plate contributions at ticketed fellowship dinners

Account.Name: Fundraiser Proceeds
Account.Description: Annual bake sale and cookbook fundraiser proceeds

Account.Name: Cookbook & Merchandise Sales
Account.Description: Church cookbook and branded item sales to members

Account.Name: Storage & Venue Rental
Account.Description: Monthly storage unit for committee tables, linens, serving ware - Gwynn Oak Self Storage

Account.Name: Kitchen Utilities
Account.Description: Church kitchen gas/electric + water share for reception events

Account.Name: Event Insurance
Account.Description: Special-event liability rider - quarterly

Account.Name: Catering Labor
Account.Description: Contract catering and serving help for large receptions

Account.Name: Reception Supplies
Account.Description: Serving ware, linens, disposables, coffee, decorations

Account.Name: Cleanup & Maintenance
Account.Description: Post-event fellowship hall cleanup service

Account.Name: Event Catering & Food
Account.Description: Catering, florals, food and rentals for receptions and repasts

Account.Name: Printing & Announcements
Account.Description: Bulletins, flyers, programs and invitations for events

Account.Name: Designated Offerings - Second Service
Account.Description: Hospitality offerings collected at the second Sunday service.

Account.Name: Special Collections
Account.Description: Special one-time collections for memorial repasts and outreach meals.

Account.Name: Reimbursements Received
Account.Description: Reimbursements received from the general fund for approved committee spend.

Account.Name: Reception Fund Checking
Account.Description: Secondary account holding funds earmarked for the year's scheduled receptions.

Account.Name: Payment Processing Fees
Account.Description: Card reader and online-giving processing fees for the committee.

Account.Name: Table & Chair Rental
Account.Description: Extra tables, chairs and tents rented for overflow reception seating.

Account.Name: Kitchen Supplies
Account.Description: Foil, wrap, storage containers and cleaning supplies for the church kitchen.

Account.Name: Event Printing
Account.Description: Programs, place cards and invitations printed for hospitality events.

Account.Name: Volunteer Meals
Account.Description: Coffee and light meals for setup volunteers on long event days.

Account.Name: Storage Supplies
Account.Description: Shelving and bins for the committee storage unit.

Account.Name: Event Food Costs
Account.Description: Food ordered directly for large receptions and the harvest dinner.
